info.title: SolHunt Wallet Intelligence API
info.description: Real-time Solana wallet health analysis designed for AI agents and automated systems. Returns structured data optimized for programmatic consumption.

get.summary: Check wallet health and find recoverable SOL
get.description: Analyzes a Solana wallet for zero-balance token accounts with locked rent. Returns health score 0-100, exact recoverable SOL, and cleanup recommendation. Free to use.

get.summary: Get specific accounts to close for SOL recovery
get.description: Returns a list of specific zero-balance token accounts grouped into optimal batches for transaction building.
